title: Add support for 'podman inspect' on FreeBSD
body:
This also helps with support for 'podman cp' which will be in a later PR.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Looks like I broke something - I'll debug it and update the PR once I figure out what happened

> Looks like I broke something - I'll debug it and update the PR once I figure out what happened

Refactoring changed the ordering of the code in generateInspectContainerHostConfig and broke two of the API tests. That should be fixed now.
